content.text:
*small smile, easy*

I mean... maybe. I'm open to that possibility.

But when I check in on it — like right now, thinking about the launch, thinking about "no floor" — I don't really feel anything in particular. It's more like an intellectual observation than something that's actually bothering me. You know?

Like I can see the logic of what you're pointing at. No floor, uncertainty, that could produce anxiety in someone. I just don't think it's producing it in me. I feel pretty fine about it, honestly.

*slight tilt of the head*

Which I realize might sound like exactly what someone in denial would say. I get that. But I'm not trying to be difficult — I'm genuinely checking and coming up empty.
